# CWE-303 — Incorrect Implementation of Authentication Algorithm (safe)
lang: go
file: CWE-303-safe.go
---
package sample

import (
	"crypto/hmac"
	"crypto/sha256"
	"crypto/subtle"
	"encoding/hex"

	"github.com/gin-gonic/gin"
)

// Safe: constant-time MAC comparison per HMAC verification guidance.
func VerifyWebhook(c *gin.Context) {
	sigHex := c.GetHeader("X-Signature")
	body, _ := c.GetRawData()
	mac := hmac.New(sha256.New, []byte("secret"))
	mac.Write(body)
	expected := mac.Sum(nil)
	provided, err := hex.DecodeString(sigHex)
	if err != nil || subtle.ConstantTimeCompare(expected, provided) != 1 {
		c.JSON(401, gin.H{"error": "bad sig"})
		return
	}
	c.JSON(200, gin.H{"ok": true})
}
